description:
Flip the runtime default for `workerExecution.mode` from `"worktree"` to `"current-branch"`.

## What to implement

In `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/config.ts`:
- Change the default value of `workerExecution.mode` from `"worktree"` to `"current-branch"`

## Prerequisites (must ALL pass before this change)

- Phase 1: types, config, registry normalization ✓
- Phase 2: current-branch launch works ✓
- Phase 3: current-branch verification works ✓
- Phase 4: scope-completion validation/review works ✓
- Phase 5 crash recovery works ✓
- UI shows execution mode correctly ✓
- Legacy worktree tests all pass ✓
- Full regression suite passes ✓

## Design Rules

- This is the LAST change that ships — not before everything else passes
- `worktree` MUST remain accessible via config file (`workerExecution.mode: "worktree"`)
- `worktree` MUST remain accessible via env (`PI_BEADWORK_WORKER_EXECUTION_MODE=worktree`)
- Do NOT remove any worktree code paths
- Verify the change by running full test suite with the new default

## Tests

- Default config resolves to `"current-branch"` without any override
- Explicit `"worktree"` config overrides the default
- Env var override still works in both directions
- Full test suite passes with new default

## Definition of Done

- Default is `"current-branch"`
- `worktree` mode preserved via explicit config/env
- All tests pass with new default
- lint/test/typecheck pass clean
title: Flip workerExecution.mode default to current-branch
